description: This file sets up Spring configuration for credit bureau integration, including defining a bean for CreditBureauClient with logic to select between a stub implementation or disabling based on configuration properties.

classes.name: CreditBureauConfig
classes.description: Spring configuration class for setting up credit bureau client integration based on properties.

methods.name: creditBureauClient
methods.description: Defines the bean for CreditBureauClient, returning either a stub implementation, a disabled response, or throwing an exception for unsupported providers.
